name: jarvis-example
description: Example devbox config for testing Jarvis devbox integration

scripts.help: echo 'Available scripts: help, build, test, check, clean, deploy'
scripts.build: echo '🔨 Building project...' && echo '✅ Build complete!'
scripts.test: echo '🧪 Running tests...' && echo '   42 tests passed' && echo '✅ All tests passed!'
scripts.check: echo '✅ Running linter and format check...' && echo '✅ No issues found!'
scripts.clean: echo '🧹 Cleaning build artifacts...' && echo '✅ Clean complete!'
scripts.deploy: echo '🚀 Deploying application...' && echo '✅ Deployed successfully!'
